Our Story

A Legacy of
Culinary Mastery

Founded in 2018 by Chef Marcus Aurelius, Aurelian was born from a singular vision: to create a dining experience that transcends the ordinary and touches the sublime. Every dish tells a story woven from the finest seasonal ingredients, sourced from artisan producers across six continents, and transformed through techniques both ancient and avant-garde.

Our kitchen is a sanctuary of creativity where tradition meets innovation. From the delicate hand-rolled pasta that pays homage to Italian grandmothers to the molecular gastronomy that pushes the boundaries of what food can be, every plate is a masterpiece crafted with obsessive attention to detail and an unwavering commitment to perfection.

The Artisan

Chef Marcus
Aurelius

With over two decades of culinary experience across the world's most prestigious kitchens, Chef Marcus Aurelius brings an unparalleled depth of expertise to every plate that leaves his kitchen. Trained under the tutelage of legendary chefs in Paris, Tokyo, and Copenhagen, his cuisine is a masterful fusion of classical French technique and contemporary innovation.

His philosophy is simple yet profound: respect the ingredient, honor the tradition, and never stop exploring. This guiding principle has earned Aurelian three Michelin stars and a place among the world's most celebrated dining destinations.

2002Graduated Le Cordon Bleu, Paris
2008Head Chef at Noma, Copenhagen
2015First Michelin Star
2018Founded Aurelian, NYC
2021Third Michelin Star

Visual Journey

Our Ambiance

Step into a world where every detail has been curated to create an atmosphere of sophisticated luxury and warm hospitality.

Acclaim

What They Say

“Aurelian is not merely a restaurant; it is a pilgrimage for the senses. Every course unfolds like a chapter in a novel you never want to end. The wagyu alone is worth the trip from anywhere in the world.”

Victoria Ashford

Food Critic, The New York Times

“In thirty years of evaluating restaurants across four continents, few have left as profound an impression as Aurelian. Chef Marcus has achieved what most chefs spend a lifetime pursuing: true culinary transcendence.”

James Chen

Michelin Guide Inspector (Ret.)

“The attention to detail at Aurelian borders on the obsessive, and we mean that as the highest compliment. From the amuse-bouche to the petit fours, every single element is flawless. A once-in-a-generation dining destination.”

Sofia Laurent

Editor, Bon Appétit Magazine
